title: Fermented Coconut Mediterranean Coconut Milk Gratin
description: Funky, crispy, comforting Mediterranean dish featuring unsweetened coconut milk and fermentation. Satvik-friendly, perfect for a raclette-grill.
instructions: Roast the sliced cucumber and zucchini in a bit of olive oil until they start to soften.
In a separate bowl, mix together the unsweetened coconut milk, coconut cream, lime juice, and a pinch of salt.
Add the sautéed garlic to the coconut milk mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the coconut milk mixture to a shallow baking dish and top with the roasted vegetables, chopped mint, and fermented cauliflower.
Drizzle the reserved coconut cream over the top of the gratin and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
Transfer the baking dish to the preheated raclette-grill and cook for about 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is heated through.
Remove the gratin from the raclette-grill and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional chopped mint and serve hot.
Reserve any leftovers for a future meal or snack.
